MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

ctap_valid_code.Description: Validation Code for entire Short Computerized Finger-Tapping Task

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_ctap_dom.LongName: CTAP Mean of Dominant Hand Trials

cnb_ctap_non.LongName: CTAP Mean of Non-Dominant Hand Trials

cnb_ctap_domsd.LongName: CTAP Standard Deviation (STDEV) of Dominant Hand Trials

cnb_ctap_nonsd.LongName: CTAP Standard Deviation (STDEV) of Non-Dominant Hand Trials

cnb_ctap_tot.LongName: CTAP Sum of DOM and NON-Dominant Trials

cnb_ctap_unf_tot.LongName: CTAP Unfiltered Sum of Dominant and Non-Dominant Hand Trials

cnb_ctap_unf_std.LongName: CTAP Unfiltered Standard Deviation of Dominant and Non-Dominant Hand Trials

cnb_ctap_excess_tot.LongName: CTAP Sum of Taps after Trials Have Ended

cnb_ctap_excess_std.LongName: CTAP Standard Deviation of Taps after Trials Have Ended

cnb_ctap_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Short Computerized Finger-Tapping Task

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
